label: laugh
groundingNote: someone's body does something of one kind: the {urn:molecule-v0:mouth|mouth} [m] moves, other people can hear something because of it; someone does not do it because this someone wants it: it happens when this someone feels something very good; when other people hear it, they can feel something good
notes: Bodily-expression molecule; the amusement cause ('funny') is classified transitively over this.
